contract_meta.rationale: Audit revealed trace/telemetry location mismatch and missing evaluation results logging. Fix critical observability infrastructure before Phase 2B UI complexity.

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Wire telemetry events to contracted trace location (.automation/execution_trace.jsonl) and implement evaluation results logging (.automation/evaluation_results.json)
project.scope: Two critical fixes only - no feature additions

execution_model.description: Fix observability infrastructure gaps identified in audit. Minimal scope, maximum traceability.

observability.description: THIS phase fixes observability - meta irony noted
observability.fix_verification: After fixes, both files must contain recent entries with correct structure

tasks.title: Verify Phase 2A completion before observability fix
tasks.description: Confirm Phase 2A backend is functional before modifying observability infrastructure

evaluation.intent: Verify Phase 2A complete before touching observability
evaluation.success_criteria: All Phase 2A artifacts exist and tests pass
evaluation.on_fail: HALT - Phase 2A must be complete before observability fixes

tasks.title: Fix #1: Wire telemetry to contracted trace location
tasks.description: Modify logEvent to dual-write: maintain .telemetry/events.log AND write structured entries to .automation/execution_trace.jsonl
tasks.audit_reference: Discrepancy #1: Trace vs telemetry location mismatch

ensure: Format for trace file: {timestamp, task_id, action, status, cmd?, exit_code?, stdout_excerpt?, stderr_excerpt?}
Use append mode for both files
Handle missing .automation/ directory gracefully (create if needed)

test_cases: trace file entries have required fields (timestamp, task_id, action, status)
trace file is valid JSONL (one JSON object per line)

success_criteria: logEvent function writes to both locations
Trace file format matches contract specification

tasks.title: Fix #4: Add evaluation results logging
tasks.description: Create post-test hook that writes pass/fail and quality dimensions to .automation/evaluation_results.json
tasks.audit_reference: Discrepancy #4: Evaluation results file not wired to runtime

content_spec.function_signature: export async function logEvaluationResult(evaluation: EvaluationResult): Promise<void>
content_spec.behavior: Append JSON object to .automation/evaluation_results.json (create file if missing, valid JSONL format)

ensure: After test run completes, call logEvaluationResult with test outcome
Quality dimensions based on test result: correctness=(status==='pass'), completeness=(passCount>0), safety=(no security errors)

test_cases: includes all required fields (timestamp, phase, task_id, status, quality_dimensions)

success_criteria: logEvaluationResult function writes structured evaluation data
runInSandbox calls evaluation logger after tests
Evaluation file format matches contract specification

tasks.title: Observability fix validation gate
tasks.description: Verify both fixes work correctly before declaring observability remediation complete

actions.description: Trigger test run and verify both files updated
steps: Check .automation/execution_trace.jsonl has recent entries with correct format
Check .automation/evaluation_results.json has recent entries with quality dimensions
Verify both files are valid JSONL (each line is valid JSON)

evaluation.intent: Confirm observability infrastructure fixed and functional
evaluation.success_criteria: All tests pass, both trace and evaluation files populate correctly during test runs, manual verification passes
evaluation.on_pass: Observability Fix COMPLETE - Ready for Phase 2B decision
evaluation.on_fail: HALT - Fix observability issues before proceeding

fix_isolation.description: Each fix must be complete and tested before proceeding to next
fix_isolation.implementation: Run tests after each fix. Halt if any test fails.

OBS-GATE.on_fail: HALT execution. Do not proceed to Phase 2B.
OBS-GATE.report: Generate diagnostic showing which observability validations failed.

minimal_scope.enforcement: ONLY fix the two audit items. No feature additions. No UI changes. No refactoring.
minimal_scope.rationale: Observability fixes should be surgical - get in, fix, verify, get out.

fallback_policies.phase2a_verification_fails: HALT - Phase 2A must be complete before observability fixes.
fallback_policies.test_fails: Fix implementation, do not skip tests.
fallback_policies.file_write_errors: Ensure .automation/ directory exists with correct permissions.
fallback_policies.coverage_drops: Add tests to maintain >80% coverage before proceeding.

release_actions.cmd: git commit -m "fix(observability): wire telemetry to contracted trace location and add evaluation logging"

ai_executor_guidelines.observability_first: These fixes ARE the observability infrastructure. Extra care with testing.
ai_executor_guidelines.minimal_scope: ONLY the two fixes. No feature creep. No 'while we're here' additions.
ai_executor_guidelines.test_driven: Write tests for both fixes. Verify both files populate correctly.
ai_executor_guidelines.fail_fast: If any test fails, halt and fix before proceeding.
ai_executor_guidelines.gate_enforcement: OBS-GATE must pass before declaring remediation complete.
ai_executor_guidelines.manual_verification_required: Actually run tests and check both files manually. Don't assume.

governance_note.for_human: This is a 30-40 minute focused fix. No UI work. No feature additions. Just infrastructure repair. After OBS-GATE passes, STOP. Take break. Assess with wife whether to proceed to Phase 2B today or tomorrow. Do not chain into 2B without explicit decision.
